series_metadata.series_description: Formal Actions: ethics grievance certified to action; Files containing information pertaining to formal actions against licensees, which include copies of Board Orders, consent agreements, notices of opportunity for hearing, appellate decisions and entries, probationary modifications, etc.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: - physical file, if it was not scanned, a period of from date of final appeal; , shred physical file. ; Electronic: - electronic medium a period of from date of final appeal; , delete electronic medium
